name: Singular Asset Management Adm Gen Fondos SA - Fondo de Inversion Singular Global Corporates Fund
summary: Singular Asset Management Adm Gen Fondos SA - Fondo de Inversion Singular Global Corporates Fund invests in global corporate bonds. It is managed by Singular Asset Management Adm Gen Fondos SA. The fund aims to provide investors with returns through investments in a diversified portfolio of corporate debt securities from around the world.
